result.stdout:
Help DZip:
Options:
/?			print this help
/c			compress the file or directory given in /i to file given in /o
/x			extract the file given in /i to directory given in /o
/i:[file/directory]	input file or directory
/o:[file/directroy]	output file or directory
/e:[password]		encode or decode archive with password

Examples:
Compress a directory=>DZip /c /i:test /o:test.zip
Extract a zip-file=>DZip /x /i:test.zip /o:test
Compress and encode directory=>DZip /c /i:test /o:test.zip /e:password
Extract as encoded zip-file=>DZip /x /i:test.zip /o:test /e:password
